parent_sha: 3f67101f9764742035d7b224dea46b1ef01d0660
commit_subject: Invert git-add gate to user-staging model and add commit-msg hook
Comment audit: scope=.githooks/commit-msg + scripts/Add-PanelMissesRow.ps1 + scripts/check-commit-message.ps1 + scripts/lib/comment-audit-helpers.psm1 + scripts/tests/check-comment-audit.tests.ps1 + scripts/tests/check-commit-message.tests.ps1 + setup.sh, 18 new comment lines, all approved (panel-converged 5/5 + user commit-approval; reduce-and-audit prep).
- .githooks/commit-msg:2: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: hook contract header - enforce commit-message format at commit-time (fail-fast)
- .githooks/commit-msg:3: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: $1 is the in-progress message path; --no-verify bypass; CI + pre-push mirror are the backstop
- .githooks/commit-msg:4: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: wired by core.hooksPath=.githooks (setup.ps1/setup.sh)
- scripts/Add-PanelMissesRow.ps1:29: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: UTC-Z guard rationale - reject local-offset so UTC-assuming tooling does not break
- scripts/Add-PanelMissesRow.ps1:30: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: generation recipe (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('...Z')
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:43: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: trailer names are diagnostic-only; the no-body rule (any line after subject) is the real boundary
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:51: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: strip exactly one terminator newline; any remaining post-subject line (blank or content) is a
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:52: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: body/footer/trailer and fails single-line - git cleanup does not reliably strip a trailing blank line
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:82: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: commit-msg hook path - check a single in-progress message file (commit does not exist yet)
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:87: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: replicate git cleanup - drop the verbose >8 scissors section and everything after it,
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:88: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: then drop comment lines, then leading blanks ONLY
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:89: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: do NOT strip trailing blanks - a blank second line is an empty body and MUST fail strict no-body
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:90: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: Get-MessageFindings strips exactly one terminating newline, so Subject+LF passes while Subject+LF+LF fails
- scripts/tests/check-comment-audit.tests.ps1:152: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: legacy em-dash separator tolerated (backward-compat with ledgers committed before the ASCII migration)
- scripts/tests/check-commit-message.tests.ps1:154: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: editor commit - git-appended # comment lines must be stripped (else a false no-body)
- scripts/tests/check-commit-message.tests.ps1:157: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: verbose commit - everything after the >8 scissors line is ignored
- setup.sh:138: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: defensive - ensure every hook is executable; Unix git silently skips non-executable hooks
- setup.sh:139: approval_turn: user commit-approval (approve_commit=true; panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: without this chmod the safeguard appears configured but never fires
- .github/playbooks/manifest.yaml:4: approval_turn: user 'em an en dash banned regardless if its your change' (panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: external constraint | justification: manifest header comment - em-dash to ASCII migration per the §3.14 ban (content unchanged except punctuation)
- .github/playbooks/manifest.yaml:10: approval_turn: user 'em an en dash banned regardless if its your change' (panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: external constraint | justification: manifest header comment - em-dash to ASCII migration per the §3.14 ban (content unchanged except punctuation)
- scripts/tests/check-comment-audit.tests.ps1:54: approval_turn: user 'em an en dash banned regardless if its your change' (panel-converged 5/5) | allowed-case: external constraint | justification: test fixture line (the <#tight#> is intentional test input); changed only to remove an em-dash from the assert label per the §3.14 ban
- .github/workflows/smart-punctuation-check.yml:3: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: workflow header - enforces the 3.14 em/en-dash ban
- .github/workflows/smart-punctuation-check.yml:4: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: shrinking allowlist holds the not-yet-purged backlog
- .github/workflows/smart-punctuation-check.yml:5: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: a separate PR purges + de-lists those files
- .github/workflows/smart-punctuation-check.yml:6: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: no paths filter - a banned char can appear in any text file
- .github/workflows/smart-punctuation-check.yml:23: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: external constraint | justification: SHA-pin v4 annotation on the checkout action
- scripts/Add-PanelMissesRow.ps1:31: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: fractional seconds allowed; canonical generator is seconds-precision ...Z
- scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1:1: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: file contract header - em/en-dash gate, shrinking allowlist, fail-closed both directions
- scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1:12: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: header close (exit-code contract)
- scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1:24: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: banned set is U+2014/U+2013, expressed as escapes so this file stays ASCII
- scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1:33: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: allowlist grammar - one repo-relative path per line; skip blank/# lines
- scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1:53: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: skip binary files (null-byte sniff)
- scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1:67: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: allowlist entries with no matching tracked file are stale
- scripts/run-local-ci.ps1:22: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: set strict-mode/stop only when INVOKED, not dot-sourced (else leaks into caller scope)
- scripts/run-local-ci.ps1:68: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: reject .. path traversal that escapes scripts/
- scripts/tests/check-no-smart-punctuation.tests.ps1:1: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: standalone pwsh self-test for the smart-punctuation checker
- scripts/tests/check-no-smart-punctuation.tests.ps1:2: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: run command
- scripts/tests/check-no-smart-punctuation.tests.ps1:3: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: builds throwaway git repos; exercises pass/violation/stale paths
- scripts/tests/check-no-smart-punctuation.tests.ps1:19: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: em-dash built at runtime so the test file stays ASCII (self-enforcing)
- scripts/tests/check-no-smart-punctuation.tests.ps1:20: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: en-dash built at runtime

- scripts/tests/check-no-smart-punctuation.tests.ps1:57: approval_turn: user 'add_ci_gate_to_this_pr=true + handle the remainder of the workflow; dont batch/drop' (panel-converged 5/5; dogfooded) | allowed-case: trade-off | justification: unlisted em-dash fails and names the file

- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:65: approval_turn: user 'more pr comments' + schedule #3 closed-loop (dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: a genuine git revert always carries the This-reverts-commit-hex body line
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:66: approval_turn: user 'more pr comments' + schedule #3 closed-loop (dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: without it an EMPTY body vacuously satisfies all-template - do NOT exempt

- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:94: approval_turn: user 'more pr comments' + schedule #3 closed-loop (dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: then drop comment lines, then leading blanks ONLY
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:95: approval_turn: user 'more pr comments' + schedule #3 closed-loop (dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: do NOT strip trailing blanks - a blank second line is an empty body and MUST fail
- scripts/check-commit-message.ps1:96: approval_turn: user 'more pr comments' + schedule #3 closed-loop (dogfooded) | allowed-case: non-obvious invariant | justification: Get-MessageFindings strips exactly one terminating newline (Subject+LF passes, +LF+LF fails)
